subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the blessed Tree, news of the safe and secure arrival hath been a source of joy and gladness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الجلیل من السدره المبارکه خبر وصول محفوظ و مصون سبب فرح و سرور
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
